changeSet.author: richard

preConditions.onFailMessage: There are some FileProperty rows that are not associated with a FileStoreRoot!
preConditions.sqlCheck: select count(*) from FileProperty where root_id is null;

changeSet.comment: This is a diagnostic to ensure that there are no FileProperty rows being added which don't have a root.

changeSet.author: richard

preConditions.onFailMessage: There should be 1 current filestoreroot row if a root has been set.

or.sqlCheck: select count(*) from FileStoreRoot where current=1
select count(*) from FileStoreRoot where current=1

changeSet.comment: This is a diagnostic to ensure that there is only one current root, if there is a root set at all

changeSet.author: richard

preConditions.onErrorMessage: There are some FileStoreRoots used in FileProperty that are not valid URIs
preConditions.sqlCheck: select count(*) from FileProperty where id in (select id from FileStoreRoot where fileStoreRoot not like ('file%'))

changeSet.comment: Diagnostic: FileStoreRoots referenced by FileProperty should be valid file URIs.

changeSet.author: richard
changeSet.comment: Initialises Batch ID generation system if batch tables are empty following some test clean-up. These statements from Spring batch core jar o.s.batch.core package
